warnings: No proof-of-reserves confirmed; hasProofOfReserves remains false.
Reserve breakdown remains null because exact reserve percentages are not supported by verified evidence.
No public OUSG reserve audit, fund audit, attestation, or reserve assurance report URL is verified; smart contract audit evidence is security evidence only.
Redemption currencies are verified as USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD, and USD bank wire, but T+1 timing and minimum redemption amount are not verified.
Missing verified on-chain liquidity; dexPairs remains empty.
Missing legal opinion or public offering/legal document URL.
status: analytics-grade re-baseline under asset_backed profile after PR #88 evidence repair
nextActions: Obtain official OUSG reserve composition with exact percentages and observation date before raising reserveScore.
Locate a public OUSG reserve audit, fund audit, attestation, assurance report, or proof-of-reserves mechanism; do not substitute smart contract audits for reserve assurance.
Verify official redemption timing, including whether T+1 applies, and confirm any current minimum redemption amount.
Add verified on-chain liquidity evidence only if DEX pairs, pool liquidity, or secondary-market depth are supported by reliable sources.
Find a public legal opinion, offering memorandum, subscription document, or equivalent legal document URL if available.
Refresh market TVL, AUM, current yield, holder count, and concentration metrics from current sources before any institutional-grade reconsideration.
notes: Decision: keep Analytics; do not upgrade to Institutional.

SourceScore increased because PR #88 repaired canonical normalized evidence, corrected the official Ethereum OUSG contract, removed unsupported reserve percentages, and aligned legal/redemption source claims with official evidence.
CompletenessScore decreased because cleaner evidence now leaves reserveBreakdown, redemptionPeriodDays, minRedemptionAmount, and on-chain liquidity unset instead of filling unsupported values.
ReserveScore is constrained by missing exact reserve composition, no proof-of-reserves, and no verified reserve audit/attestation; smart contract audit evidence is not reserve assurance.
LiquidityScore is constrained because verified redemption currencies do not prove T+1 liquidity, redemption minimums, DEX liquidity, or secondary-market depth.
RiskScore remains constrained by reserve-transparency gaps, issuer/intermediary dependency, legal transfer restrictions, and unavailable on-chain liquidity evidence.
No blockers are added because the dataset is usable for Analytics, but the warnings prevent institutional-grade treatment under the asset_backed profile.
